source.title: PDD Holdings XBRL Financial Data from SEC EDGAR + Quarterly Earnings Releases

extractions.claim: PDD's investment income (interest) was RMB 20.55B in FY2024, up from RMB 10.24B in FY2023 and RMB 4.0B in FY2022 -- a 5x increase in 2 years
extractions.evidence: XBRL tag InvestmentIncomeInterest: FY2022 RMB 3,997,100,000; FY2023 RMB 10,238,080,000; FY2024 RMB 20,553,493,000. This represents interest earned on the company's massive cash pile deployed into short-term investments, bank deposits, and treasury instruments.

verification.verifier_notes: Extracted directly from SEC EDGAR XBRL companyfacts API for CIK 0001737806. Cross-verified: Q4 2024 press release states 'Interest and investment income, net: RMB 5,233.2M' for Q4 alone.

extractions.claim: Interest income from bank deposits alone was RMB 7.31B in FY2024 (InterestIncomeDepositsWithFinancialInstitutions), with additional RMB 2.83B in operating interest income
extractions.evidence: XBRL InterestIncomeDepositsWithFinancialInstitutions: FY2022 RMB 2,442,413,000; FY2023 RMB 5,750,934,000; FY2024 RMB 7,314,780,000. InterestIncomeOperating: FY2022 RMB 606,447,000; FY2023 RMB 1,354,785,000; FY2024 RMB 2,827,453,000.

verification.verifier_notes: From SEC EDGAR XBRL. These are subcomponents of the total investment income.

extractions.claim: Investment income equals 19% of FY2024 operating income and 18% of net income -- PDD's cash pile is a significant profit engine
extractions.evidence: FY2024: Investment income RMB 20.55B / Operating income RMB 108.42B = 19.0%. Investment income RMB 20.55B / Net income RMB 112.43B = 18.3%. The pre-tax income of RMB 132.7B includes this RMB 20.55B + RMB 3.12B other non-operating income on top of the RMB 108.42B operating profit.

verification.verifier_notes: Computed from XBRL: InvestmentIncomeInterest / OperatingIncomeLoss for FY2024

extractions.claim: Q3 2025 interest and investment income was RMB 8.57B; 9-month 2025 interest income can be derived as approximately RMB 19.2B
extractions.evidence: Q3 2025 press release: Interest and investment income, net: RMB 8,565.2M. Q2 2025: RMB 10,422.6M. Q1 2025: RMB 223.1M (appears anomalously low, likely reflects timing of realized gains or mark-to-market effects). 9-month total: approximately RMB 19,210.9M.

verification.verifier_notes: Q1 figure appears anomalously low vs quarterly run-rate (~RMB 5.1B/quarter in FY2024). May reflect unrealized investment losses offsetting interest income in Q1 2025.

extractions.claim: PDD's cash, cash equivalents and short-term investments totaled RMB 423.8B ($59.5B) as of Sept 30, 2025
extractions.evidence: Balance sheet: Cash/equivalents + short-term investments: RMB 331.6B (Dec 2024) -> RMB 364.5B (Mar 2025) -> RMB 387.1B (Jun 2025) -> RMB 423.8B (Sep 2025). Growing at approximately RMB 30B/quarter from operating cash flow retention.

verification.verifier_notes: From quarterly earnings releases. XBRL confirms FY2024 ShortTermInvestments = RMB 273,791,856,000.
